title: Proxy Server Updated
description: Fiw's mod that allows you to connect to servers through a proxy but updated
body:
# Proxy Server (Unofficial Update)
> This mod is not the original [Proxy Server](https://modrinth.com/mod/proxy-server) mod. This is just an update. The original was made by Fiw.

## About
Client-side Minecraft mod that allows you to connect to servers through a proxy.

## Features
- Supports SOCKS4 (IPv4) proxy
- Supports SOCKS5 (IPv4) proxy
- Supports authentication for private proxies

## Credits
- Original mod by [Fiw](https://modrinth.com/mod/proxy-server)
